shortDescription: 3,000+ slots and 3,000+ live games per one source. Confirmed sister brand to Fezbet, Zet, and Boomerang (Rabidi N.V. group)
payoutTimes: 1-3 business days typically per one detailed Irish-specific source
license: Disputed — cited variously as Anjouan (Gaming Board of Anjouan, two different license numbers given by different sources), Curaçao eGaming, and PAGCOR (Philippines) — see disambiguation notes
